mapper.select:
SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_LOGIN_ID , U.USER_NM , U.USER_IMAGE_URI , U.USER_SEXDSTN , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_DC , U.USER_USE , U.USER_LOCK , U.USER_LAST_LOGIN_DT , U.HIST_ID , U.REGIST_DT , U.REGIST_ID , U.UPDT_DT , U.UPDT_ID , U.USER_MBTLNUM FROM SWC_USER U
AND ( UPPER(U.USER_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%') OR UPPER(U.USER_LOGIN_ID) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%') )
AND UPPER(U.USER_EMAIL) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%')
AND UPPER(U.USER_MBTLNUM) LIKE '%' + CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%')
AND UPPER(U.USER_SEXDSTN) = UPPER(#{sex, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND U.USER_USE = UPPER(#{use, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND U.USER_LOCK = UPPER(#{lock, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND UPPER(U.USER_EMAIL) = UPPER(#{matchEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND UPPER(U.USER_LOGIN_ID) = UPPER(#{matchLoginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY U.USER_NM

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_LOGIN_ID , U.USER_PASSWORD , U.USER_NM , U.USER_IMAGE_URI , U.USER_SEXDSTN , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_DC , U.USER_USE , U.USER_LOCK , U.USER_LAST_LOGIN_DT , U.HIST_ID , U.REGIST_DT , U.REGIST_ID , U.UPDT_DT , U.UPDT_ID , U.USER_MBTLNUM FROM SWC_USER U WHERE U.USER_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_USER ( USER_ID , USER_LOGIN_ID , USER_NM , USER_PASSWORD , USER_IMAGE_URI , USER_SEXDSTN , USER_EMAIL , USER_DC , USER_USE , USER_LOCK , USER_LAST_LOGIN_DT , HIST_ID , REGIST_DT , REGIST_ID , UPDT_DT , UPDT_ID , USER_MBTLNUM) VALUES ( UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{sex, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{remarks, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , UPPER(#{use, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , UPPER(#{lock, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , NULL , NULL , NOW() , #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NOW() , #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NULL)
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM SWC_USER_AUTHOR
USER_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

DELETE FROM SWC_USER
USER_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
